sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113495" key="xauno/prwktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαυνό-πρωκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n113495.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wide-breeched,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg001.perseus-grc1:104" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">104</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
